text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe I should go farther, all the way to the
planetarium.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I wonder where I should go on my next day off...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Admire Vega had an enjoyable day
off!
